rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections
Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence
Branching logic should use nested `if ... then ... else`
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in a component type contract unless represented through valid variables or outputs
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
